title: Final ginkgo migration
body:
Completion of the migration from bats to ginkgo.  This includes:

* load
* mount
* pause
* port
* run_networking
* search

Note: build will be done within a different PR

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: Please yank out pause_test.go, I've spruced it up and have added to it in #285
LGTM though I'd love to see the pause tests yanked out to make rebasing #285 easier
required is of the opinion that CI is failing, but Fedora and CentOS and Travis are all passing.
Tests are green enough. Going to merge.
